I1CC I1CC_BRAIN_INJURY (I1CC) Traumatic Brain Injury CHAR 1 Disease diagnosis: diseases - nerological - traumatic brain injury. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown.
284 I1D I1D_ASHD (I1D) Arteriosclerotic Heart Disease CHAR 1 Disease diagnosis: diseases - heart/circulation - arteriosclerotic heart disease (ASHD). 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown.
285 I1DD I1DD_ANX_DIS (I1DD) Anxiety Disorder CHAR 1 Disease diagnosis: diseases - psychiatric/mood - anxiety disorder. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown.
